mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rate signals monetary tightening that increases the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, reducing present value of S&P 500 earnings and producing negative forward returns over the subsequent 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS at 0.08% on 2022-02-01 with imminent rate hike cycle
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns following FEDFUNDS increases are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rate decline below 4% signals tight labor market and wage pressure that erodes corporate profit margins, triggering negative S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days as earnings expectations compress.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE at 3.8% on 2022-02-01, already below 4% threshold
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in > 65% of instances when UNRATE < 4%, or Rank IC < 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Retail sales growth decelerates while housing starts contract simultaneously, signaling weakening consumer demand and investment that portends earnings downgrades and negative equity returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS month-over-month growth < 0.5% AND HOUST declines > 5% year-over-year
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST at 1638k units on 2022-01-01, RSAFS at 649.8B on 2022-01-01
failure_condition: Joint occurrence of both trigger conditions produces positive 20-day returns in > 60% of cases, or interaction coefficient is not statistically significant (p > 0.10) in logistic regression.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production index declines month-over-month, indicating supply-side weakness and reduced manufacturing capacity utilization that signals economic slowdown and negative S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days as forward guidance deteriorates.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns following INDPRO declines are not significantly negative (mean return > 0 with t-test p > 0.05), or Rank IC < 0.01.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll employment growth accelerates above 300k per month while unemployment remains below 4%, creating a tight labor market that forces wage growth and inflation expectations higher, causing equity multiple compression and negative 60-day returns.
regime_hint: overheated labor market with inflation risk
failure_condition: Both conditions triggered simultaneously produce positive 60-day returns in > 65% of cases, or interaction term is not statistically significant (p > 0.10) in multivariate model.

mechanism_narrative: Consumer price inflation measured by CPIAUCSL accelerates above 6% year-over-year, forcing the Federal Reserve into aggressive tightening that raises real discount rates and produces negative S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days as rate hike expectations increase.
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL at 284.18 on 2022-02-01 (7.9% YoY), FEDFUNDS at 0.08%
regime_hint: inflation shock with monetary policy lag
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 60% of instances when both conditions are met, or correlation between CPIAUCSL acceleration and negative returns is < 0.15.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth measured by GDPC1 decelerates to below 2% annualized rate, signaling economic slowdown that reduces corporate earnings growth expectations and produces negative S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns following GDPC1 < 2% growth are not significantly negative (mean return > 0 with t-test p > 0.05), or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts measured by HOUST decline sharply month-over-month while retail sales growth remains positive, indicating a divergence where consumer spending is not translating to investment demand, signaling demand composition shift that produces negative 20-day equity returns.
candidate_trigger: HOUST month-over-month change < -8% AND RSAFS month-over-month change > 0.3%
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST at 1638k on 2022-01-01, RSAFS at 649.8B on 2022-01-01
regime_hint: demand reallocation away from housing investment
failure_condition: Joint occurrence of both conditions produces positive 20-day returns in > 65% of cases, or interaction coefficient is not statistically significant (p > 0.10) in logistic regression model.
